name: §6Blaze
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Defense: §a30
§7Intelligence: §b100

§6Nether Embodiment
§7Increases §cCombat §7and §dMiscellaneous
§7stats by §a10% §7while on the §cCrimson
§cIsle§7.

§6Bling Armor
§7Upgrades §cBlaze Armor §7stats and
§7ability by §a40%§7.

§6Fusion-Style Potato
§7Double effects of hot potato books

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Frozen Blaze Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aBlaze§7 pets.

§aThis skin is animated!

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
